case_title: DANIEL L WONG VS. DENNIS HOM et al

MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON JAN-28-2009 IN 206, HEARING ON APPLICANT/DEFENDANT DENNIS HOM'S WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS. APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT GRANTED THE APPLICATION IN WHOLE. ORDER SIGNED, AND ENDORSED-FILED COPY GIVEN TO APPLICANT. JUDGE: JAMES J. MCBRIDE; CLERK: E. BURA; REPORTER: JOE VICKSTEIN CSR #4780(D206)

MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON JAN-28-2009 IN 206, HEARING ON APPLICANT/DEFENDANT DENNIS HOM'S WAIVER OF ADDITIONAL COURT FEES AND COSTS. APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT FINDS THAT THE APPLICANT'S INCOME IS ENOUGH TO PAY THE COMMON NECESSARIES OF LIFE AND ADDITIONAL COURT FEES AND COSTS. FEE WAIVER DENIED AS TO JURY FEES AND EXPENSES AND PER DIEM FEES. DENNIS HOM HAS TEN DAYS TO PAY THE FILING FEES OR THE FILINGS WILL BE STRICKEN. ORDER DENYING WAIVER OF FEE SENT TO ALL PARTIES. JUDGE: JAMES J. MCBRIDE; CLERK: E. BURA; REPORTER: JOE VICKSTEIN CSR #4780(D206)
